title: Fix gap marker position vs day label

log.context: Fix gap marker position vs day label

Done. The change in `/mnt/data/hello-world/timeline.html` suppresses gap markers whenever the gap spans a day boundary. Specifically, before inserting a gap marker, it now compares the local date strings of the previous and current events (`prevDay === evDay`). If they differ, the gap marker is skipped entirely since the day label already signals the time jump. Gap markers still appear for large intra-day gaps as before.
